data.title: Zum Founder and CEO Ritu Narayan Named Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2026 Bay Area Finalist by EY US
data.description: Ritu Narayan, the Founder and CEO of Zūm, has been acknowledged for her exceptional leadership in developing a groundbreaking platform transforming student mobility for 26 million children throughout the United States. This recognition comes as Narayan is announced as a finalist for the Entrepreneur award.

data.title: TSMC Debuts A13 Technology at 2026 North America Technology Symposium
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, TSMC unveiled its latest advancement in cutting-edge process technology at the 2026 North America Technology Symposium. The new A13 process, a direct reduction of the previously acclaimed A14 node from 2025, offers more compact and efficient designs. This innovation caters to the soaring demand for computational power across various sectors like artificial intelligence, high-performance computing, and mobile devices. TSMC's stock is listed as TWSE: 2330 and NYSE: TSM.

data.title: Cadence Collaborates with TSMC to Accelerate Design of Next-Generation AI Silicon
data.description: A significant development has emerged in the tech sector as Cadence revealed an expansion of its partnership with TSMC. The collaboration, which involves Nasdaq-listed Cadence, seeks to propel AI-driven semiconductor advancements. This expanded initiative aims to provide crucial components such as IP, signoff-ready solutions, complete design infrastructure, and cutting-edge certified flows. These offerings are tailored for top-tier AI silicon and are compatible with TSMC's N3, N2, A16™, and A14 process technologies. By teaming up more extensively, the companies endeavor to aid customers in minimizing iterations and enhancing correlation concerning DTCO-focused advancements.

data.title: Tradebe Environmental Services and City of Bridgeport Partner to Celebrate Earth Day 2026 with Community Events and Youth Support
data.description: In Bridgeport, Connecticut, on April 22, 2026, Tradebe Environmental Services and the City of Bridgeport collaborated to commemorate Earth Day 2026 by organizing a series of community engagement events, environmental conservation activities, and initiatives to support local businesses. This partnership aimed to foster awareness about environmental issues and encourage sustainable practices among residents.

data.title: LifeWave Announces National Casting Call to Appear with William Shatner, Jeri Ryan, and Jonathan Frakes
data.description: LifeWave's "Boldly Go from Fan to Co-Star" campaign is offering two lucky winners the opportunity to feature in the company's short film series, The World's Oldest Intern. The campaign was unveiled in Salt Lake City on April 22, 2026. As part of the initiative, LifeWave launched a national casting call contest, calling on fans from all over the United States to participate and potentially secure a spot in the series. The campaign aims to engage with audiences and provide them with a chance to become a co-star in the upcoming film.

data.title: Earth Day Spotlight: Florida International University showcases world-leading ocean science -- from unique undersea lab to global shark conservation
data.description: On Earth Day, April 22, 2026, an underwater research laboratory located 60 feet below the ocean surface near the Florida Keys is gathering crucial data about the condition of a highly important reef system in the Western Hemisphere. This initiative aims to monitor and assess the health of the reef ecosystem, with a focus on analyzing key indicators such as biodiversity, water quality, and overall ecological well-being. The research lab serves as a vital resource in understanding and preserving this valuable marine environment, contributing to scientific efforts to protect and sustain the reef system's biodiversity.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Up 3% As Markets Hope For Iran War Settlement
data.description: Bitcoin is on the verge of reaching $79,000, driven by optimism surrounding a potential resolution to the conflict in Iran. As of now, the prices for various cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) is at $78,815, Ethereum (ETH) at $2,392, Solana (SOL) at $88.18, XRP at $1.45, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.09735, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.056259. Recent data from Coinglass indicates that 100,948 traders were liquidated, resulting in losses totaling $448.03 million over the past 24 hours. Additionally, SoSoValue data reports a net inflow of $11.8 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs and $43.4 million from spot Ethereum ETFs on Tuesday. Among the top-performing assets in the last day are SPX6900, Pudgy Penguins, and Sei. Notable news includes Société Générale expanding its crypto client base. For more details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mitutoyo Brings Precision to the Sunshine State With the Launch of Its New Lakeland Florida Facility
data.description: Mitutoyo has recently launched its Lakeland Metrology Service Center in Aurora, Illinois. This new center aims to provide enhanced access to measurement, inspection, calibration, and training services in the Florida region. The facility is set to cater to the growing demand for these services, offering specialized solutions to businesses and individuals. The establishment of this center signifies Mitutoyo's commitment to meeting the increasing needs of the market by providing state-of-the-art metrology services.

data.title: Alchip to Showcase Advanced AI ASIC Technologies at TSMC 2026 Technology Symposium
data.description: Emphasizing its preparedness for the 2nm ecosystem, integration of 3DIC technology, and leadership in advanced packaging, a prominent entity in the tech industry showcased significant advancements. This includes ensuring a seamless transition to the 2nm era, incorporation of 3DIC technology for enhanced performance, and demonstrating expertise in cutting-edge packaging solutions. These achievements underscore the company's commitment to staying at the forefront of technological innovation.
TSMC finds ASML’s new equipment too expensive for use, indicated by $ASML.

data.title: IonQ Publishes Definitive Technical Report, Establishing Its Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computing Trajectory – Setting a New Standard for Technical Specificity and Transparency
data.description: College Park, Maryland - IonQ (NYSE: IONQ), a prominent quantum platform company, has revealed a comprehensive blueprint for scalable and fault-tolerant quantum computing. This blueprint, marking a significant global milestone in the quantum industry, sets a new standard for technical transparency. IonQ's publication provides detailed and complete guidelines for the development of quantum computing, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation and progress. This announcement emphasizes IonQ's position as a leader in the field, offering unparalleled specificity and advancing the standards within the quantum computing sector.

data.title: Tesla Gets Earnings-Day Reality Check: 'Haven't Seen A New Tesla In A Long Time,' Market Expert Says
data.description: Electric vehicle manufacturer Tesla Inc. is set to release its Q1 earnings report after Wednesday's market close. Stephen Callahan, a Trading Behavior Specialist at Firstrade, voiced his lack of enthusiasm for the upcoming report, citing a perceived lack of new Tesla vehicles on the roads recently. With a forward P/E ratio of 231x and a massive market cap of $1.45 trillion, Tesla is under scrutiny as the first of the Magnificent Seven companies to report this earnings season. The stock has declined by 12.7% year-to-date, trailing behind Microsoft Corp. Wall Street analysts anticipate Tesla to post earnings per share of $1.01 on revenue of $22.35 billion, representing a 15.6% increase in revenue compared to the same quarter last year. Despite these expectations, Callahan's skepticism persists regarding Tesla's performance.

data.title: Umbra's front-end disabled after $280M Kelp exploit. Privacy measures questioned in response to hacking threat.
data.description: Umbra has taken action to protect against hackers by shutting down its front-end system to prevent them from laundering a significant sum of $280 million stolen during the Kelp DAO exploit. This move comes as privacy protocols come under increased scrutiny.

data.title: NexGen Health Introduces XERF, an Advanced Non-Invasive Solution for Skin Lifting and Rejuvenation in Silicon Valley
data.description: NexGen Health has recently introduced XERF, a cutting-edge non-invasive treatment aiming to enhance skin tightening and lifting without the need for surgery or recovery time. This innovative technology is designed to penetrate deeper layers of the skin, stimulating the natural production of collagen for gradual improvement. With XERF, individuals can experience advanced skin rejuvenation with no downtime, helping to achieve firmer and lifted skin.

data.title: Synopsys Partners with TSMC to Power Next-Generation AI Systems with Silicon Proven IP and Certified EDA Flows
data.description: Cutting-edge AI-driven digital, analog, and verification processes, along with a wide range of IP solutions, have significantly improved performance metrics for TSMC's advanced technologies. Notably, the recent successful deployment of the low-power M-PHY v6.0 IP on the TSMC N2P platform marked a significant advancement. Additionally, the successful tape-out of the 64G UCIe IP and ongoing development targeting speeds of 224G have further signaled the effectiveness of these innovative approaches in pushing the boundaries of chip design.

data.title: Chickie's & Pete's partners with ERock to host Draft Party Benefiting the Eagles Autism Foundation
data.description: Join the 2026 Draft Party in Philadelphia on April 23, 2026, at 8:00 PM, held at Chickie's & Pete's South. Hosted by Eric Emanuele, this event welcomes football fans and community supporters for an exciting night.

data.title: Frank Vella, CEO of Constant Contact, named Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2026 New England finalist by EY US
data.description: In Boston on April 22, 2026, EY US recognized innovative entrepreneurs driving the evolution of business. Frank Vella, the CEO of Constant Contact, emerged as a top contender for the Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2026 New England Award presented by Ernst & Young LLP (EY US). This prestigious accolade, now in its 41st year, highlights trailblazing individuals who exemplify entrepreneurial spirit and accomplishment.
